description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, overhanging roof and a two-story main structure with a mix of wood and dark panel exterior finishes. The front facade is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a central entrance, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A detached garage is connected to the main house by a paved walkway, and the property is enclosed by a black fence with a gate. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a rectangular swimming pool, enhancing the recreational appeal. The overall design is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The layout suggests a focus on open-plan living and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a backyard patio with a pool, all enclosed by a black fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the backyard, highlighting the pool, patio furniture, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with large windows, the main entrance, the walkway, and the detached garage, as well as the full fence and gate.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow, emphasizing the connection between the house and garage, and the minimal window arrangement on this side.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear of the bungalow, showing the back wall, more windows, and the outdoor living area with the pool and lounge furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
